reviews.comment:
Excelentes baños y súper limpios y cómodos y c surtido papel e higiene en los baños pero faltan playeros q hizo lento el despacho

(Translated by Google)
Excellent bathrooms, super clean and comfortable, and well-stocked with toilet paper and hygiene products, but the lack of beach towels slowed down service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5X2MyQ1V3EAE

reviews.comment:
Baños limpios, con papel higiénico, jabón líquido y aire para secar las manos. Se puede pagar la nafta con la aplicación de Ypf. El mercado es modesto pero se desayuna bien y tiene sandwiches como para almorzar. Como celíaca me encantó que tengan sandwiches sin tacc debidamente envasados, los precios caros como suele ocurrir para los panificados libres de gluten.

(Translated by Google)
Clean restrooms with toilet paper, liquid soap, and hand dryers. You can pay for gas with the YPF app. The market is modest, but they have a good breakfast and sandwiches suitable for lunch. As someone with celiac disease, I loved that they had gluten-free sandwiches, properly packaged, although the prices are high, as is often the case with gluten-free baked goods.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5X2VTSFZ3EAE
